audit_rules.description: Escalation rule: if any batch audit finds 5 or more total discrepancies, all remaining pending batches in the same precinct for the same race must also be audited.
Cross-race escalation: if a precinct is escalated for any race (RULE-001 triggered), all pending batches in that precinct for ALL other races in the same county must also be audited.
Investigation referral: if total discrepancies across all audited batches in a precinct for any single race exceed 20, the precinct must be formally referred for investigation.
Voter challenge review: if a precinct is referred for investigation (RULE-003 triggered), all pending voter challenges in that precinct must be reviewed.

Voter was told precinct was closed but it was before closing time

Ballot was not counted despite being submitted on time
